_upstream_comment: Base URL of your 9router instance (no trailing slash). Required.
_upstreamApiKey_comment: Static key forwarded to 9router as Authorization: Bearer and x-api-key. Empty = pass client headers through.
_gatewayApiKeys_comment: Array of keys the gateway accepts from clients (one per user). Empty array = no auth. Send as Authorization: Bearer <key> or x-api-key.
_upstreamTlsVerify_comment: Verify TLS for HTTPS upstreams. Set false for self-signed certs.
_ssePingInterval_comment: Interval in milliseconds for SSE ping keep-alive comments. Prevents Cloudflare/NGINX idle timeouts during long thinking periods. Set 0 to disable. Default: 30000 (30s).

models._prefix_comment: Optional global namespace prepended to every exposed id (e.g. 'gw-' -> 'gw-anthropic/gpt-5'). Empty = none.
models._exposePrefix_comment: Prepended to every exposed id EXCEPT aliases starting with one of exposeExempt. Set to '' to disable. Default 'anthropic/' so Claude Code sees non-Claude models under an Anthropic-style id.
models._exposeExempt_comment: Aliases starting with any of these strings are NOT given exposePrefix. Add more prefixes here if you have other 'native' families.
models._mappings_comment: Exposed alias -> mapping object. `upstream` is the model id on 9router. `displayName` and `contextWindow` are optional and surfaced in GET /v1/models. `maxOutputTokens` is the default max output tokens for the model. `enabled` (default true) — set false to hide from listings and reject requests without deleting the mapping. `responses` (default false) — set true when the upstream speaks /v1/responses natively; otherwise the gateway bridges client /v1/responses requests to /v1/chat/completions upstream and translates the response shape back. `capabilities` — override model capabilities (thinking, effort, etc.); if not set, defaults to full Claude-compatible capabilities. Shorthand: a bare string still works and is treated as { upstream: value }.
models._restricted_comment: Upstream model ids that are always rejected with 403, even if requested by raw name.
models._allowUnknown_comment: If true, model names not in 'mappings' are forwarded verbatim. If false, they get 404.
models._defaultMaxOutputTokens_comment: Default max_tokens returned in Anthropic model list for models without explicit maxOutputTokens. Default: 16384.
